speaker: speaker1
text: What can I do for you , young man ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I need to rent three pairs of skates for the morning .

speaker: speaker2
text: One pair of 37 , and two pairs of 21 . One for me , and the other two for two kids .

speaker: speaker1
text: Here you are . And here are three crash helmets .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thanks . Well , those two kids are beginners . What should I do about their safety ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , there are a lot to do , but nothing to worry about . First , make sure they don't go far from the railings .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , yeah , maybe I should ask them just to walk along the railings .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's a good idea . And remind them to be slow at the beginning , not to run into the railings .

speaker: speaker1
text: Never go to the center of the lake . The ice there is too thin to skate on .

speaker: speaker2
text: Got it . Thanks for reminding me . And , are there any intensive training courses ?
